Teams

Competitions on Xbox Live can pit individuals against other individuals. However, your game can also enable the formation of permanent teams. This section describes the teams services available on Xbox Live and explains how to use them.

  • Introduction to Team Competitions
  • Creating Teams
  • Joining Teams and Recruiting Players
  • Setting Team Properties
  • Family Titles and Teams

Note    The XDK provides a sample that demonstrates how to add team competitions to your title. You'll find it in the <XDKDIR>\Samples\Xbox\XboxLive3\Teams directory where <XDKDIR> is the directory containing the XDK.
